indicator_details.atr15: simple mean of true range over the latest 20 completed continuous 15m bars, including the decision bar; unavailable until 20 bars exist in the current continuity segment
indicator_details.directional_clv: LONG: (close-low)/(high-low); SHORT: (high-close)/(high-low); zero-range bars are ineligible
indicator_details.premium_z: latest completed 5m premium close minus rolling 30-day mean divided by rolling 30-day standard deviation; baseline is shifted one 5m row and requires seven continuous days
indicator_details.normalizer_std_floor: values with rolling standard deviation <= 1e-12 are unavailable

statistics.maximum_drawdown_R: maximum peak-to-trough decline of chronological cumulative net R
statistics.positive_quarter_ratio: fraction of UTC calendar quarters with positive summed net R among quarters containing at least one trade
statistics.after_top5_R: total net R after removing the five largest positive-R trades
statistics.lb80_mean_R: mean net R minus 0.8416212335729143 times the ordinary sample standard error; used only for deterministic screening/ranking
statistics.final_uncertainty: quarter-block bootstrap is reported for the selected candidate but is not used to relax any deterministic gate

quarterly_optional_asset_cash_gate.selection: maximize min(expanding lb80 mean R, recent-8-quarter lb80 mean R), then min PF, then trade count; if none pass, select CASH
quarterly_optional_asset_cash_gate.deployment: selected universe applies only to the next quarter; no prior decision is rewritten

slot_clock_clarification.stop_or_target: global slot becomes free at the close of the touching 5m bar
slot_clock_clarification.time_exit: exit is priced at the max-hold 5m open, but the global slot is conservatively unavailable for a new entry at that same timestamp and becomes free five minutes later
